title: mimusops zeylanica
intro: Mimusops zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon ironwood or Indian olive, is a tree species native to Sri Lanka and parts of India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mimusops zeylanica include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to make oils and other products.
